---
title: "🔷 Github Discussion forum"
body-classes: no-chapter-nav
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

[]{#sec-84-forum}

### GitHub Discussion Forum

You can ask questions, report issues, or participate in discussions on GitHub:

👉 <https://github.com/media-methods/programming-with-r/discussions>

[![GitHub Forum](files/images/github-forum.jpg){fig-alt="Screenshot of the Github Discussion forum"}](https://github.com/media-methods/programming-with-r/discussions)
